benefits.description: Describes synergistic effects of dosing twice daily; notes nighttime injection may be more important; has experience comparing batches from multiple suppliers

protocol_notes: Recommends 100-150mcg of each compound twice daily (morning as pre-workout and before bed). Mixes both peptides in the same syringe. Advises 30 min fasting before morning dose, 1-2 hours before bed dose. Notes inconsistent results often stem from batch purity issues rather than complete product failure. Recommends suppliers with COA/Janoshik reports per batch.
